allow: Bash(cd "D:\\frontend\\vakachat\\server" && node --check src/controllers/guest.controller.js 2>&1 && node --check src/routes/guest.routes.js 2>&1 && echo "OK")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where name='node.exe' get ProcessId,CommandLine 2>nul")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "$pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001\).OwningProcess; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Done'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5175 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 20236 -Force; Stop-Process -Id 7304 -Force; Stop-Process -Id 25368 -Force; Stop-Process -Id 25524 -Force; Write-Host 'All killed'")
